title: fix(parser): pipe syntax AGGREGATE projection order
body:
This PR fixes the order of the projection list. (true for both bq and dbx)

```
input:
WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS x1, 2 AS x2, 3 AS x3, 4 AS x4, 5 AS x5)
FROM x |> AGGREGATE SUM(x1) as s_x1 GROUP BY x2 as g_x2 |> WHERE s_x1 > 0

output (main):
WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS x1, 2 AS x2, 3 AS x3, 4 AS x4, 5 AS x5), __tmp1 AS (SELECT SUM(x1) AS s_x1, x2 AS g_x2 FROM x GROUP BY g_x2) SELECT * FROM __tmp1 WHERE s_x1 > 0

output (branch):
WITH x AS (SELECT 1 AS x1, 2 AS x2, 3 AS x3, 4 AS x4, 5 AS x5), __tmp1 AS (SELECT x2 AS g_x2, SUM(x1) AS s_x1 FROM x GROUP BY g_x2) SELECT * FROM __tmp1 WHERE s_x1 > 0
```

**DOCS**
[BigQuery pipe syntax aggregate projection order](https://docs.cloud.google.com/bigquery/docs/reference/standard-sql/pipe-syntax#aggregate_pipe_operator)
